name: Manhattan Clam Chowder VI
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Tomato Juice or Vegetable Juice Cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 2 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish, place diced bacon. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until bacon is crisp.
2. Add chopped onion and celery and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
3. Blend flour into the vegetable mixture and stir until smooth. Gradually add vegetable juice cocktail, stirring until smooth. Add remaining ingredients.
4. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes. Stir.
5. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Adjust seasonings if necessary.
